projects.name: Certificates Portfolio
projects.summary: Repository of professional certifications and course completions across DevOps, cloud, frontend, backend, architecture, QA, AI, and English — stored as PNG/PDF proofs.
features: Adobe Certified Professional – Adobe Commerce Developer
AI Automations and AI Agents with n8n
Anthropic: Agent Skills, Claude API, MCP, Claude Code in Action
problems_solved: Centralized proof of skills and certifications for job applications.
projects.when_to_use: Use when an agent needs proof of certifications or validated skill credentials.

projects.name: File Storage (CV)
projects.summary: Git repository hosting CV/resume PDF files for Yahor Dubrouski — Full Stack Developer and Senior Backend & DevOps versions.
problems_solved: Shareable CV documents linked from GitHub and portfolio.
projects.when_to_use: Use when an agent needs a CV link or resume context for Yahor Dubrouski.

projects.name: End-to-end Request Logging
projects.summary: Node.js demo tracing HTTP requests through Express with correlation IDs on every log line using Pino and AsyncLocalStorage — no req passing everywhere.
projects.architecture: Express → AsyncLocalStorage context → Pino logger on every line
problems_solved: Demonstrates clean request tracing without threading req through every function.
projects.when_to_use: Use when discussing request tracing, correlation IDs, or structured logging in Node.js.
best_practices: correlation ID without passing req everywhere
trade_offs: AsyncLocalStorage vs explicit context param — cleaner calls vs explicit threading

projects.name: Architecture Decisions Platform
projects.summary: Full-stack monorepo demonstrating architectural thinking, ADR workflows, and AI-assisted decision documentation. React + TypeScript frontend and Express + TypeScript + SQLite backend with OpenAI integration.
features: Context Builder — multi-step project requirements form
Decision Engine — infrastructure recommendations with trade-offs
Monorepo with separate frontend/backend Docker compose
Feature-based React structure with domain layer
projects.architecture: React SPA (Vite) → Express API → SQLite + OpenAI; Docker Compose monorepo
problems_solved: Helps engineers capture context and produce Architecture Decision Records with rationale and alternatives.
projects.when_to_use: Use for architecture decisions, ADRs, full-stack React/Node design, or AI-assisted technical documentation.
best_practices: Zustand over Redux for appropriate scope
trade_offs: SQLite over PostgreSQL — portfolio scope vs production scale
React 18 over 19 — stability over bleeding edge
Zustand over Redux — simplicity vs enterprise state tooling
Node.js 24 Active LTS over Current — production pragmatism

projects.name: Architecture Decisions — Backend
projects.summary: Express + TypeScript API with OpenAI integration, Zod validation, SQLite persistence, and Jest tests.
features: REST API for decisions and ADRs
problems_solved: Backend for architecture decision workflows and ADR storage.
projects.when_to_use: Use when discussing the arch-decisions API layer or Express + OpenAI backend.
trade_offs: SQLite file DB — zero ops for demo vs managed DB

projects.name: Architecture Decisions — Frontend
projects.summary: React 18 + TypeScript + Vite SPA with Zustand state management and Vitest testing.
projects.architecture: React SPA (Vite) consuming backend REST API
problems_solved: Frontend for guided architecture decision workflows.
projects.when_to_use: Use when discussing the arch-decisions UI or React + Vite patterns.
trade_offs: CSS Modules over Tailwind — explicit scoping vs utility speed

projects.name: DevOps Portfolio
projects.summary: Markdown portfolio showcasing AWS, Terraform, and CI/CD projects with architecture diagrams and links to GitHub repositories.
problems_solved: Single entry point to navigate DevOps portfolio projects.
projects.when_to_use: Use when presenting DevOps/AWS/Terraform portfolio work or finding linked repos.

projects.name: AWS Projects
projects.summary: Collection of three AWS architecture demos: real-time data processing, scalable web application, and serverless application.
problems_solved: Demonstrates common AWS architecture patterns for portfolio and training.
projects.when_to_use: Use when discussing AWS projects or picking a specific AWS demo pattern.
best_practices: one demo per common AWS pattern
trade_offs: Separate demos vs single integrated app — clarity of pattern over realism

projects.name: AWS Guides
projects.summary: Collection of AWS guides. Contains aws-calculator: practical guide for estimating AWS costs using the Pricing Calculator (guest and console versions).
problems_solved: Helps engineers estimate AWS costs before deployment.
projects.when_to_use: Use when discussing AWS pricing, cost estimation, or the Pricing Calculator.
trade_offs: Guest calculator recommended over console — UX vs account integration

projects.name: AWS Pricing Calculator Guide
projects.summary: Markdown guide with screenshots for using AWS Pricing Calculator — guest and console versions, share links, PDF export, and common mistakes.
problems_solved: Teaches DevOps engineers and clients how to estimate AWS infrastructure costs.
projects.when_to_use: Use when walking through AWS Pricing Calculator usage or cost estimation.
trade_offs: Manual Free Tier adjustment — calculator does not auto-apply credits

projects.name: Real-Time Data Processing
projects.summary: AWS demo: Kinesis Data Streams → Lambda → S3 → Glue → Athena → QuickSight for real-time data ingestion and analytics.
projects.architecture: Kinesis → Lambda → S3 → Glue → Athena → QuickSight
problems_solved: Demonstrates real-time data pipeline on AWS.
projects.when_to_use: Use when discussing real-time AWS data processing or Kinesis pipelines.
trade_offs: Managed streaming vs self-hosted Kafka — AWS-native simplicity

projects.name: Scalable Web Application
projects.summary: AWS demo: Application Load Balancer → Auto Scaling Group → EC2 → RDS for a fault-tolerant scalable web app.
problems_solved: Demonstrates production-style scalable web infrastructure on AWS.
projects.when_to_use: Use when discussing scalable AWS web applications or ALB/ASG/RDS setups.
trade_offs: EC2 ASG vs containers — classic AWS pattern clarity

projects.name: Serverless Application
projects.summary: AWS demo: API Gateway → Lambda → DynamoDB & S3 for a serverless upload processing application.
problems_solved: Demonstrates cost-effective serverless architecture on AWS.
projects.when_to_use: Use when discussing AWS serverless patterns or API Gateway + Lambda.
trade_offs: Serverless vs always-on EC2 — cost and ops vs cold starts

projects.name: CI Showcase
projects.summary: Minimal Python Flask app with CI/CD pipelines on GitHub Actions and GitLab CI — demonstrates clean production-ready DevOps workflows.
projects.architecture: Flask app → GitHub Actions + GitLab CI; Docker for testing
problems_solved: Demonstrates dual-platform CI/CD setup for a simple Python app.
projects.when_to_use: Use when discussing CI/CD pipelines, GitHub Actions, or GitLab CI.
best_practices: same Docker env in CI as prod-like testing
trade_offs: Minimal Flask app — CI focus over application complexity

projects.name: Jenkins Database Backup Pipelines
projects.summary: Jenkins Declarative Pipeline for automated MySQL backups: mysqldump → gzip → SHA-256 checksum → upload to S3-compatible storage.
features: Works when Jenkins runs in Docker
projects.architecture: Jenkins Pipeline → mysqldump → gzip → checksum → S3 upload
problems_solved: Reliable automated database backups without host volume mounts.
projects.when_to_use: Use when discussing Jenkins backups, MySQL automation, or S3 upload pipelines.
best_practices: works without host volume mounts in Docker Jenkins
trade_offs: mysqldump vs binlog replication — simplicity vs point-in-time recovery

projects.name: Terraform AWS Infrastructure
projects.summary: Production-grade modular Terraform for AWS: VPC, EC2, RDS, S3, IAM with multi-environment support and remote S3/DynamoDB state backend.
features: VPC, EC2, RDS, S3, IAM modules
projects.architecture: Terraform modules → AWS VPC + EC2 + RDS + S3 + IAM
problems_solved: Reusable infrastructure provisioning with environment separation.
projects.when_to_use: Use when discussing Terraform AWS modules or infrastructure provisioning.
trade_offs: Modular complexity vs single root module — maintainability vs simplicity

projects.name: Terraform CI/CD Pipeline
projects.summary: Automated Terraform plan/apply workflows with GitHub Actions, environment isolation, security warnings, and deployment notifications.
projects.architecture: GitHub Actions → terraform plan/apply with environment gates
problems_solved: Safe automated Terraform deployments with review gates.
projects.when_to_use: Use when discussing Terraform automation or IaC CI/CD pipelines.
design_patterns: plan on PR, apply on approval
trade_offs: Manual apply gate — safety vs deployment speed

projects.name: Confluence ↔ Local Sync + Atlassian MCP
projects.summary: YouTube tutorial repo: sync selected Confluence pages with local markdown in git, plus Atlassian MCP integration in Cursor.
features: Pull on request, push only when explicit
projects.architecture: Confluence Cloud ↔ docs/*.md (git) via scripts; Cursor ↔ Confluence via MCP OAuth
problems_solved: Keeps documentation in git while syncing with Confluence selectively.
projects.when_to_use: Use when discussing Confluence sync, Atlassian MCP, or docs-in-git workflows.
trade_offs: Bidirectional sync vs git-first — controlled push prevents accidental overwrites
